acquisition.target: VoidZero (operates Vite, Vitest, Rolldown, Oxc, Vite+)
acquisition.amount_estimate_basis: A round $12.5M (2025-11) + 17 ppl + dev-tooling comp set (Vercel $2.5B, Replit $1.16B) with 15-30x implied PS
acquisition.deal_structure_inferred: stock + cash mix (no 8-K filed → likely <$1B; non-cash-dominant)
acquisition.ecosystem_fund_purpose: Vite ecosystem grants, administered by Vite core team
acquisition.astro_acquisition_precedent: Cloudflare's 2025 Astro acquisition: same model, still open, still deploy-anywhere

close_6_4_blocked_sources: Bing search (GWF redirected to .NET framework content)

slight_up_+1_to_+3_pct.rationale: Strategic narrative + toolchain integration; weekend retail/alg buying

flat_-1_to_+1_pct.rationale: Announcement fully digested 6/4 post-close, weekend wait-and-see

down_-1_to_-4_pct.rationale: Investor concern 'another acquisition spend' or 'innovation fatigue'

strong_up_+3_to_+6_pct.rationale: Amount reveals as 'bargain' (<$200M), market sees undervalued pickup

a_share_mapping.rationale: Cloudflare acquires JS toolchain → 'frontend + edge' narrative strengthened → A-share CDN/SASE sector benefits

primary_mappings.name: 深信服
primary_mappings.logic: SASE / zero-trust, comparable to Cloudflare One

primary_mappings.name: 光环新网
primary_mappings.logic: IDC + cloud computing, edge node assets

a_share_mapping.risk: If A-share sentiment is weak on 6/5, catalyst may fail

developer_ecosystem.vite_position: Bundler de facto standard for post-Node era

competitor_pressure.bun: Full-stack runtime + toolchain; pressure mounts post-acquisition
competitor_pressure.deno: Node alternative; squeezed between Cloudflare + Vercel

developer_ecosystem.microsoft_position: Deno Land investor (2022 $21M lead); Azure Static Web Apps losing to Cloudflare; leans Vercel camp

second_order_impact.bun_pressure: Toolchain lag vs Vite+; near-zero on Cloudflare platform post-deal; risk of retreat to embedded JS runtime niche
second_order_impact.deno_chooses_side: Forecast: H2 2026 deeper Vercel integration (medium confidence)

tier_a_plus: SEC EDGAR (CIK 0001477333): no 6/4 8-K filed for acquisition
tier_a: HN Algolia API: hits for 'Cloudflare VoidZero' (story 48398055, 93 points, 48 comments, front page)
